---
title: "Dan Yavorsky"
about:
  id: main-content
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile_pic3.png
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:dyavorsky@gmail.com
    - icon: briefcase
      href: https://www.gbkcollective.com/team-profiles/danyavorsky
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dyavorsky/
    - icon: twitter-x
      href: https://twitter.com/dyavorsky
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/dyavorsky
  # - icon: stack-overflow
  #   href: https://stackoverflow.com/users/4573108/dany
  # - icon: mortarboard-fill
  #   href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=E2qzlUYAAAAJ&hl=en
  # - icon: person-check-fill
  #   href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4095-6405

format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

:::{#main-content}

## Current

 - SVP, Analytics [|]{.yellow} [GBK Collective]{.altgreen}
 - Lecturer, Econometrics [|]{.yellow} [UCLA Anderson]{.altgreen}
 - Lecturer, Customer Analytics [|]{.yellow} [UCSD Rady]{.altgreen}

-----

## Work History

 - GBK Collective [|]{.yellow} [2022 - Present]{.altgreen}
 - Bain & Co [|]{.yellow} [2020 - 2021]{.altgreen}
 - Cornerstone Research [|]{.yellow} [2006 - 2014]{.altgreen}

-----

## Education

 - PhD Quant. Marketing [|]{.yellow} [UCLA Anderson 2020]{.altgreen}
 - MBA Management [|]{.yellow} [UCLA Anderson 2014]{.altgreen}
 - CFA Charterholder (inactive) [|]{.yellow} [CFA Institute 2012]{.altgreen}
 - BA Economics & Mathematics [|]{.yellow} [CMC 2006]{.altgreen}

:::
